method: Prices from Inceptron's own public OpenAI-compatible catalog API https://api.inceptron.io/v1/models (no auth; pricing.prompt / pricing.completion in USD per token x 1e6); cross-checked against OpenRouter endpoint data (provider_name=='Inceptron'). The public API now lists 6 priced text LLMs (was 3 on 2026-06-18) — GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.6 Fast, and Kimi K2.7 Code are newly exposed publicly. All 6 prices agree between api.inceptron.io and OpenRouter (in/out).

models.notes: fp4 quant, 1.05M context. Cache read $0.26/1M. Inceptron model id zai-org/GLM-5.2. NEW in public /v1/models (not present on 2026-06-18). Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 1.20 / out 4.20).
fp8 quant, 202K context. Cache read $0.26/1M. Inceptron model id zai-org/GLM-5.1-FP8. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 1.40 / out 4.40).

int4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.20/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.7-Code. NOW PRESENT in public /v1/models (was missing on 2026-06-18, only visible in logged-in console). Confirmed on OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.75 / out 3.50).

int4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.20/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6. Input now $0.66/1M (was $0.67 on 2026-06-18, $0.68 prior). Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.66 / out 3.50).

fp4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.40/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6-Fast. NEW in public /v1/models — higher-throughput 'Fast' tier of Kimi K2.6 at 2x the price.
fp8 quant, 196K context. Cache read $0.05/1M. Inceptron model id MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.15 / out 0.90).
